节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述:
Listens to the event of add form.

You can use this method to listen to the event of add form.

form info. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Callback<formInfo.RunningFormInfo> } observerCallback - The callback is used to return the running
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - The application is not a system application.

parameters.说明: The callback is used to return the running

error_codes.description: The application is not a system application.

节点.功能描述:
Listens to the event of add form.

You can use this method to listen to the event of add form for a particular card host.

form info. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { string } hostBundleName - Indicates the bundle name of the form host application.
@param { Callback<formInfo.RunningFormInfo> } observerCallback - The callback is used to return the running
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - The application is not a system application.

parameters.说明: Indicates the bundle name of the form host application.
The callback is used to return the running

error_codes.description: The application is not a system application.

节点.功能描述:
Cancels listening to the event of add form.

You can use this method to cancel listening to the event of add form.

@throws { BusinessError } 202 - The application is not a system application.

parameters.说明: Callback<formInfo.RunningFormInfo> } [observerCallback] - The callback is used to return the running
